A list of useful docs to support your journey
FB Troubleshooting & Best Practice Guide
Need best practice advice or troubleshooting help using free Facebook guides?
Head on over to this compiled list I created with Facebook's help.
Click me!
Messenger Bot for Students
Join this friendly bot to gain up to date access to news and events related to the course. Join or
unsubscribe at any time.
Click me!
CPA Calculator
Use this to calculate and plan your CPA goals. Ensure you watch the training video to make the
most out of this.
Click me!
EPIC MEGA List of Growth Tools
A crowd-sourced list of tools you can use to grow your business faster.
Click me!
When To Use Impressions for Campagins
A link to my public group on how and when to use Impressions on your hot audiences.
Click me!
The $26.5M FB Ads Growth Case Study
Scaling to 8 figures using Facebook ads.
Click me!
3 Ad Funnel Testing a $697 Course
A mini case study on testing 3 acquisition funnels for a digital product.
Click me!
30% Drop in Cost Per Install using Manual
Bid
A mini case study on using manual bid to drop cost per app install and cost per app
registration for a multi-million dollar client.
Click me!
Manual Bid Using FB's Split Test Tool
A mini case study on using Facebook's built in Split Test tool to test manual bid strategies
Click me!
The GC10X Fanpage Formula!
A strategy to help those trying to cut through their fan page with great content, that can afford to
spend up to $100 testing to find the best content to then post up organically.
Click me!
Masterclass: Scaling Through Acquisition
Marketing
This is a talk on marketing growth as a Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) I was excited to
share with a few hundred product and marketing folk in Edinburgh, Scotland in 2016
alongside Rand Fishkin (Moz), Oli Gardner (Unbounce) and Wil Reynolds (Seer Interactive) and
others.
Click me!
Troubleshooting a Pixel Issue (and How
You Can Do The Same)
An Ecommerce (Shopify) store which had issues with numbers, which after investigation (and lots of
campaign testing/tweaking) turned out to be a pixel issue.
Click me!
ClickFunnels: FB Ads Pixel Install Guide
Since the official guide was a little light and the YouTube videos incorrect, I wrote this up on how to
properly install the FB ads pixel within ClickFunnels. (you'll need to join the CF FB group to see this).
Click me!
